task_desc: Implement graded wind response with brace and orient behaviors per spec -- The spec says wind (air tool) should cause "Brace, orient, or take off" but currently all wind strength feeds uniformly into MECH_JO which accumulates fear, producing only startle/fly escape at any intensity. Three changes needed: (1) Add wind-direction tracking: compute wind angle from the air tool drag vector (dragStart to currentMousePos, already tracked) and store as BRAIN.stimulate.windDirection in handleCanvasMousemove and handleCanvasMouseup so the connectome knows which direction wind is coming from, (2) Add a "brace" behavior state for weak-to-moderate wind: when BRAIN.stimulate.wind is true and windStrength is below ~0.5 and accumStartle has not reached the startle threshold, the fly should decelerate to near-zero speed and orient to face into the wind (targetDir = windDirection + PI, facing the wind source); add brace to BEHAVIOR_MIN_DURATION (500ms), BEHAVIOR_COOLDOWN (1000ms), and insert it into evaluateBehaviorEntry between groom and rest in priority with entry condition checking wind active and windStrength below threshold and not cooling down; in computeMovementForBehavior, brace sets targetSpeed=0 and targetDir toward wind source; add brace to syncBrainFlags as non-moving, (3) Add brace animation: in drawLegs during brace state, widen leg stance slightly (increase base hip angles by ~10%) and suppress jitter (multiply jitter amplitude by 0.1) to show the fly bracing; in drawAntennae during brace state or any active wind, bias antenna target angles toward the wind direction for a wind-sensing posture, (4) Scale MECH_JO stimulation by windStrength in connectome.js (currently BRAIN.stimulate.wind triggers full MECH_JO activation regardless of windStrength at connectome.js:310-313; change to dendriteAccumulateScaled with windStrength so weak wind produces less fear accumulation and strong wind still triggers startle/fly). Files: js/main.js, js/connectome.js.
